text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as Yaeno Muteki and I are training for
the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I set a new record for the training
course!
choice_data_list: And I thought we were going all out...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Didja see? Didja see? I just set a new school
record!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm the best racer ever at Tracen Academy! Isn't
that awesome?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I saw. But why are you pushing yourself so hard
just before the Takarazuka Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Haha! That's a good point! But I don't want to
lose to some old record!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's just like you. You're always going all out.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're the same in actual races as well. But isn't
that why you run out of energy before the final
sprint?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Urgh! So you noticed that, huh...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I think it would benefit you to learn how and
when to use your strength.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I don't wanna finish a race and feel like I
could've gone harder! I'd rather run till I drop!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You always seem so relaxed during races. Are you
really giving it all you've got?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling you and I actually aren't so
different... I guess that's why I feel like you're
always holding back.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but the Japanese Derby was a different story!
You were totally on fire then!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, I can't help but feel like you've
got power you're not using!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You think I was better... at the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Does it really look like I'm not giving it my all
right now?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That can't be right. I have my obsession now, and
it's burning so strongly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Takarazuka Kinen has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
What a bummer that Oguri's not running today...
Oh, Yaeno Muteki's here? She's pretty fast too!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Pretty fast? She's been doing well at every single race. I'm telling you she's the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Hold the phone! Is that Sakura Chiyono O and
Mejiro Ardan over there?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Dude, shut up! You're gonna bother them! But
thank goodness... They both look like they're
doing well. I wonder if they're gonna get back to
racing soon.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Inariiiii! It's such an honor to race with you today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bamboo! Love that energy ya always have!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just what I like to see! Make sure you bring that
into the race with you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Count on it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Yaeno! Where's your game face? Ya look
like you're just gettin' ready to eat my dust!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about me. I'm suppressing the flames
of battle inside me until it's time to let it loose.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Don't see why ya gotta be so precious about it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But whatevz! Just stay outta my way!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Say what you want, but my blaze fierce and
water still are perfectly balanced.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm ready!
